metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Agent Skills by rishubil

plugins.name: shell-script
plugins.description: Specialist skill for writing Bash shell scripts with best practices and error handling.

plugins.name: fetch-docs
plugins.description: Fetch web-based development documentation and save it as clean markdown files preserving the site's directory structure.

plugins.name: monkey-c
plugins.description: Specialist skill for developing Garmin Connect IQ applications in Monkey C. Use when writing Watch Faces, Device Apps, Widgets, or Data Fields for Garmin wearables.

plugins.name: wordpress-meta-box
plugins.description: Specialist skill for WordPress Meta Box plugin — custom fields, meta boxes, custom post types, and the full Meta Box API (fields, actions, filters, functions).

plugins.name: wordpress-classic-theme
plugins.description: Specialist skill for developing WordPress classic (PHP-based) themes — template hierarchy, The Loop, theme functions, sidebars, widgets, navigation menus, Customizer API, and more. Does not cover block themes.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Create git commits following Conventional Commits format with a mandatory body explaining why the change was made.

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Structured, opinionated review of an implementation plan across architecture, code quality, tests, performance, and debuggability before any code changes.

plugins.name: resticprofile
plugins.description: Specialist skill for resticprofile — a configuration profile manager for the restic backup tool. Covers profile config files (TOML/YAML/JSON/HCL), commands, and scheduling.

plugins.name: gh-readonly
plugins.description: PreToolUse hook that intercepts read-only gh CLI calls and redirects them to a safe allowlist-based wrapper script.

plugins.name: skill-eval-hook
plugins.description: UserPromptSubmit hook that forces mandatory skill evaluation before every task — Claude must assess each available skill and activate relevant ones before implementation.
